title: Ultracentrifuge clean-up of phage lysate for TEM
steps: Take 1.1 ml of existing plate lysate
Take 1 ml to clean up; save remainder to titer pre- versus post-clean up
Pour off supernatant away from pellet; pipette off residual
Pour off supernatant away from pellet; pipette off residual
Pour off supernatant away from pellet; pipette off residual
Titer pre- and post-clean up samples
Store at 4C for up to 2 weeks
creator: Kathy N Lam
